issues.description: This text has a contrast ratio of 2.8:1 against its background. Users with low vision or color deficiency may not be able to read it. WCAG 2.2 requires a minimum of 4.5:1 for normal-weight text.
issues.fixSuggestion: Change the text color from #999999 to #767676 or any color that achieves at least a 4.5:1 contrast ratio on your background.

issues.description: The chart image lacks an alt attribute. Screen reader users will hear 'image' with no context about what data the chart displays.
issues.fixSuggestion: Add a descriptive alt attribute that summarizes the chart's key insight: which region leads, and by how much.

issues.description: The link displays 'Learn more' but the accessible name is only 'arrow-icon'. Voice control users cannot activate this link by saying 'Learn more'.
issues.fixSuggestion: Ensure the visible text is included in the accessible name. Change aria-label to include 'Learn more' or remove aria-label entirely.

issues.description: Tab navigation jumps from the main menu to a hidden sidebar that was closed via CSS, then back to the main content. Keyboard users become disoriented and cannot navigate predictably.
issues.fixSuggestion: Remove tabindex from hidden elements, or set visibility:hidden on the sidebar container so it's removed from the tab order entirely.

issues.description: A modal dialog contains focusable elements but is marked aria-hidden=true. Assistive technology users cannot access the dialog content even though it is visually present.
issues.fixSuggestion: Remove aria-hidden from the dialog when it is open, or use display:none to hide it entirely when closed.

issues.description: The dashboard filter buttons are 18×18px. Users with motor impairments or touch screen users may struggle to activate these small targets.
issues.fixSuggestion: Increase the touch target to at least 24×24px. You can make the visible button smaller if the clickable area extends via padding.

issues.description: Focus enters a custom date picker component but cannot be exited via Tab or Escape. Keyboard users must refresh the page to continue navigation.
issues.fixSuggestion: Add keyboard event handlers to allow Escape to close the picker and restore focus to the triggering element.

issues.description: The search input field lacks an autocomplete attribute. Users with cognitive disabilities or those using password managers cannot benefit from auto-fill features.
issues.fixSuggestion: Add autocomplete='search' to the input to allow browsers and assistive technologies to understand the field's purpose.

issues.description: Status indicators use only color (green dot for success, red for error) without text labels or icons. Color-blind users cannot distinguish the status.
issues.fixSuggestion: Add text labels ('Success', 'Error') or icons (checkmark, X) in addition to color coding.
issues.codeFixExample: ● Error● Success

issues.description: The document title is 'Dashboard' on all dashboard views. Screen reader users cannot distinguish between different dashboard pages (Overview, Analytics, Reports).
issues.fixSuggestion: Update the document.title dynamically to reflect the current view: 'Overview - Dashboard' or 'Analytics - Dashboard'.

issues.description: When date range validation fails, the error message only says 'Invalid date range' without explaining the correct format or range constraints.
issues.fixSuggestion: Provide specific guidance: 'Start date must be before end date. Use format MM/DD/YYYY.'
issues.codeFixExample: Start date must be before end date. Use format MM/DD/YYYY.

issues.description: The export button shows an icon with no visible text label. Users may not understand what the button does, and the accessible name is not visible.
issues.fixSuggestion: Add visible text 'Export' next to the icon, or use a tooltip that appears on focus.

issues.description: Users must re-enter their department selection when switching between dashboard tabs, even though the context hasn't changed.
issues.fixSuggestion: Store the department selection in session state and auto-populate it when users return to the dashboard.

issues.description: The html element lacks a lang attribute. Screen readers cannot determine the correct pronunciation rules for the page content.
issues.fixSuggestion: Add lang='en' (or appropriate language code) to the html element.

issues.description: Custom tab interface uses div elements with click handlers but no role='tab' or role='tabpanel'. Screen reader users cannot identify this as a tab control.
issues.fixSuggestion: Add role='tablist', role='tab', role='tabpanel', and aria-selected to implement the tab pattern correctly.

issues.description: The sidebar navigation uses fixed pixel heights that clip content when text is resized to 200%. Users with low vision cannot read truncated navigation items.
issues.fixSuggestion: Use relative units (rem, em) instead of px for heights, or ensure overflow is visible with scroll.

issues.description: The dashboard markup contains duplicate id attributes ('chart-container'). This breaks accessibility APIs that rely on unique IDs.
issues.fixSuggestion: Ensure all id attributes are unique within the document.

issues.description: Data table uses div elements styled as a grid instead of native table markup. Screen readers cannot convey row/column relationships to users.
issues.fixSuggestion: Use semantic table elements: table, thead, tbody, tr, th, td. Or add role='table', role='row', role='cell' with proper headers.

issues.description: Instructions refer to 'the chart on the right' without a text label. Users who cannot perceive spatial layout (screen magnifiers, screen readers) cannot identify the chart.
issues.fixSuggestion: Add a visible heading or aria-label to identify the chart: 'Revenue by Region chart'.
issues.codeSnippet: See the chart on the right for details.
issues.codeFixExample: See the Revenue by Region chart for details.

issues.description: The same 'Save' button is labeled 'Save Changes' on one page and 'Update' on another. Voice control users cannot reliably activate it.
issues.fixSuggestion: Use consistent labels for components with the same function across all pages.

issues.description: Changing the date range dropdown immediately submits the form and reloads the page without warning. Users may lose unsaved data.
issues.fixSuggestion: Add an explicit 'Apply' button, or warn users before changing context.

issues.description: The dashboard auto-refreshes every 60 seconds without a way to pause, stop, or extend the interval. Users with reading disabilities cannot finish reading before refresh.
issues.fixSuggestion: Provide a pause button, allow users to disable auto-refresh, or extend the interval to at least 20 hours.

issues.description: The main navigation changes order between pages. 'Reports' appears before 'Analytics' on some pages, after on others. Screen reader users lose their mental model.
issues.fixSuggestion: Maintain consistent navigation order across all pages in the application.
issues.codeSnippet: <!-- Page 1: Overview | Reports | Analytics --><!-- Page 2: Overview | Analytics | Reports -->
